offline_build.note: tsc -b typecheck + vite production build of the seeded reference-app; 421 modules transformed, no errors (only benign node:fs/os/path browser-externalization warnings, same as sibling lessons). Confirms the seed compiles.

live_validation.blocker: deepbook-sandbox `pnpm deploy-all --quick` currently fails at `sui client test-publish` (CLI-vs-Move-package version drift); no healthy sandbox available
live_validation.consequence: This lesson is live-gated (final_verification runs `pnpm vitest run` against a running sandbox). With no healthy sandbox, the two live tests (resting-bid place/list/cancel lifecycle; market buy with no-liquidity tolerance) could not be executed, and the Step 7 dual-output-mode learner sub-agent pass was not run.

known_issues: Live validation pending a healthy sandbox: once deepbook-sandbox `pnpm deploy-all --quick` publishes cleanly, re-run `cd reference-app && pnpm vitest run` (give the market maker ~10s to seed DEEP_SUI asks) and dispatch the dual-mode learner validation before considering this lesson shippable.
